title: NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Technical Support III Posts
description: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Technical Support III Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs...
